title: Senior Python Backend Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior Python Backend Engineer to join our growing team. You will design and build scalable microservices for our AI-powered platform. Requirements: 5+ years Python, Django/FastAPI, AWS, Docker, PostgreSQL. Strong problem-solving skills and excellent communication.
requirements: 5+ years Python, Django or FastAPI, AWS services, Docker and Kubernetes, PostgreSQL

title: ML Platform Engineer
description: Join our ML Platform team to build and maintain the infrastructure powering our machine learning models. You will work on data pipelines, model serving, and monitoring. Experience with Python, Kubernetes, and ML frameworks required.
requirements: 3+ years ML infrastructure, Python, Kubernetes, TensorFlow or PyTorch, data pipeline tools

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We need a Full Stack Developer comfortable with React, TypeScript, and Python backends. You will own features end-to-end from database to UI. Fast-paced startup environment with significant ownership and growth opportunities.
requirements: React, TypeScript, Python, PostgreSQL, REST API design, 3+ years full stack experience
